    redis.clients.jedis.resps.KeyedListElement
    Use KeyValue.

    Field and Description
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Schema.fields
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Schema.Field.name
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Schema.Field.noIndex
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Schema.Field.sortable
    redis.clients.jedis.search.aggr.AggregationResult.totalResults
    Use AggregationResult.getTotalResults().
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Schema.Field.type
  • Deprecated Methods 
    Method and Description
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandArguments.addObjects(int[])
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.clusterSlaves(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.ClusterCommands.clusterSlaves(String)
    Use ClusterCommands.clusterReplicas(java.lang.String).
    redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams.end(StreamEntryID)
    redis.clients.jedis.params.SetParams.get()
    Use setGet method (without setting SetParams.get().
    redis.clients.jedis.resps.KeyedListElement.getElement()
    Use Map.Entry.getValue().
    redis.clients.jedis.timeseries.TSAlterParams.retentionTime(long)
    Use TSAlterParams.retention(long).
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.sentinelSlaves(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.SentinelCommands.sentinelSlaves(String)
    Use SentinelCommands.sentinelReplicas(java.lang.String).
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Query.setPayload(byte[])
    Since RediSearch 2.0.0, PAYLOAD option is deprecated.
    redis.clients.jedis.search.IndexDefinition.setPayloadField(String)
    Since RediSearch 2.0.0, PAYLOAD_FIELD option is deprecated.
    redis.clients.jedis.search.Query.setWithPayload()
    Since RediSearch 2.0.0, WITHPAYLOADS option is deprecated.
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.shutdown(SaveMode)
    Use Jedis.shutdown(redis.clients.jedis.params.ShutdownParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.ServerCommands.shutdown(SaveMode)
    Use ServerCommands.shutdown(redis.clients.jedis.params.ShutdownParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.slaveof(String, int)
    Use Jedis.replicaof(java.lang.String, int).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.ServerCommands.slaveof(String, int)
    Use ServerCommands.replicaof(java.lang.String, int).
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.slaveofNoOne()
    Use Jedis.replicaofNoOne().
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.ServerCommands.slaveofNoOne()
    Use ServerCommands.replicaofNoOne().
    redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams.start(StreamEntryID)
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.strAlgoLCSKeys(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.strAlgoLCSKeys(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StringPipelineBinaryCommands.strAlgoLCSKeys(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StringBinaryCommands.strAlgoLCSKeys(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.strAlgoLCSKeys(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.strAlgoLCSKeys(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StringCommands.strAlgoLCSKeys(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StringPipelineCommands.strAlgoLCSKeys(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7. LCS can be used instead of this method.
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.strAlgoLCSStrings(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7.
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.strAlgoLCSStrings(byte[], byte[], StrAlgoLCSParams)
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.strAlgoLCSStrings(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    STRALGO LCS command will be removed from Redis 7.
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.strAlgoLCSStrings(String, String, StrAlgoLCSParams)
    redis.clients.jedis.UnifiedJedis.topkCount(String, String...)
    redis.clients.jedis.bloom.commands.TopKFilterCommands.topkCount(String, String...)
    As of RedisBloom 2.4, this command is regarded as deprecated.
    redis.clients.jedis.bloom.commands.TopKFilterPipelineCommands.topkCount(String, String...)
    As of RedisBloom 2.4, this command is regarded as deprecated.
    redis.clients.jedis.TransactionBase.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.UnifiedJedis.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.MultiNodePipelineBase.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.Pipeline.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamPipelineBinaryCommands.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    Use StreamPipelineBinaryCommands.xinfoGroups(byte[]).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamBinaryCommands.xinfoGroup(byte[])
    Use StreamBinaryCommands.xinfoGroups(byte[]).
    redis.clients.jedis.TransactionBase.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.UnifiedJedis.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.MultiNodePipelineBase.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.Pipeline.xinfoGroup(String)
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamPipelineCommands.xinfoGroup(String)
    Use StreamPipelineCommands.xinfoGroups(java.lang.String).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamCommands.xinfoGroup(String)
    Use StreamCommands.xinfoGroups(java.lang.String).
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.xpending(byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], int, byte[])
    Use Jedis.xpending(byte[], byte[], redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.xpending(byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], int, byte[])
    Use CommandObjects.xpending(byte[], byte[], redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamPipelineBinaryCommands.xpending(byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], int, byte[])
    Use StreamPipelineBinaryCommands.xpending(byte[], byte[], redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamBinaryCommands.xpending(byte[], byte[], byte[], byte[], int, byte[])
    Use StreamBinaryCommands.xpending(byte[], byte[], redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.Jedis.xpending(String, String, StreamEntryID, StreamEntryID, int, String)
    Use Jedis.xpending(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.CommandObjects.xpending(String, String, StreamEntryID, StreamEntryID, int, String)
    Use CommandObjects.xpending(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamPipelineCommands.xpending(String, String, StreamEntryID, StreamEntryID, int, String)
    Use StreamPipelineCommands.xpending(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.commands.StreamCommands.xpending(String, String, StreamEntryID, StreamEntryID, int, String)
    Use StreamCommands.xpending(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams).
    redis.clients.jedis.params.XPendingParams.xPendingParams()
    Use XPendingParams.xPendingParams(redis.clients.jedis.StreamEntryID, redis.clients.jedis.StreamEntryID, int).
